description: Human judge audit: inter-rater reliability between the LLM statement-match judge and a human on a stratified 120-cell sample (seed 42), drawn across Studies 3/5/6 plus calibration.
motivation: Defend the negative results against the single-LLM-judge critique by measuring human<->LLM agreement (Cohen's kappa).
formal_results: Sampling tooling and sample CSVs exist (calibration, study3, study5, study6); target overall kappa >= 0.6 (>=0.5 per stratum). No graded kappa output committed yet.
results_description: Audit sampling is set up but human grading / kappa computation has not been completed.
conclusions: Pending - judge reliability not yet established; the cross-study conclusions currently rest on the LLM judge alone.
